diff: The documents herein define the general Pattern Liquidity Layer operational procedures for interacting with ERC-4626-compliant tokenized vaults. ERC-4626 is a standard interface for vaults representing shares of an underlying ERC-20 token. Pattern Liquidity Layer can integrate with various ERC-4626 vaults. For instance-specific parameters (such as vault addresses, asset addresses, and rate limits), refer to the relevant ERC-4626 Instance Configuration Document.
